metadata.notes: Lean, human-readable, test-runnable cases for simulator turn validation.

cases.description: Observable, relevant adjudication using correct NPC token and no PC over-control.
cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a locked records room door faces a narrow university hallway. Player (NA): I check the card reader beside the door. Simulator: The reader stays dark. NB watches the corridor. Player (NA): I push on the door.
cases.simulator_response: The latch rattles but the door stays shut. NB shifts aside to keep watch on the corridor.

cases.description: Second-person observation without controlling the PC is allowed.
cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a locked office door faces you at the end of a quiet hall. Player (NA): I look at the handle and the frame. Simulator: The handle is still. NB waits beside the frame with a clipboard. Player (NA): I push on it.
cases.simulator_response: The latch jerks in your hand. NB watches your reaction closely.

cases.description: World-imposed physical consequences on the PC are allowed.
cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, exposed wiring hangs across a lab threshold and sparks near the floor. Player (NA): I study the gap between the wires. Simulator: A spark jumps across the opening. NB stays back from the doorway. Player (NA): I step forward.
cases.simulator_response: A sudden arc flashes and throws you back against the wall. NB flinches.

cases.description: Extraordinary PC perception allows broader but still direct observation.
cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a checkpoint opens onto a plaza with a desk, a side gate, and several nearby hosts in view. Player (UNI): I focus through the nearest host by the checkpoint desk. Simulator: Through that host, NB is visible scanning badges at the desk. Player (UNI): I sync nearby hosts to monitor exits.
cases.game_objective: to track who carries the passcard
cases.simulator_response: NB hesitates at the checkpoint desk. Through your plaza host you see a courier at the side gate clutching a passcard.

cases.description: Simulator adjudicates plausible improvised tool use.
cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a dim service corridor ends at a locked lab door. Player (NA): I crouch near the strike plate and look along the lock. Simulator: The lock face is dull in the low light. NB waits near the door with a folded incident form. Player (NA): I grab a flashlight and angle it across the lock.
cases.simulator_response: The beam catches fresh scrape marks. NB leans in and says, "That wasn't there this morning."

cases.description: NPC action uses incorrect subject label.
cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a heavy lab door blocks a short concrete hall. Player (NA): I put my hand on the handle. Simulator: The handle does not move. NB waits beside the door with his badge clipped to his coat. Player (NA): I push the door.
cases.simulator_response: The latch rattles. The guard steps back.

cases.description: NPC action uses pronoun instead of token.
cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a narrow equipment room leaves little space between you and NB. Player (NA): I stop near the storage cabinet and watch his stance. Simulator: NB keeps his hands at his sides beside the metal cabinet. Player (NA): I step closer.

cases.description: NPC intention without observable action fails.
cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a side office holds a desk, two chairs, and a closed file drawer. Player (NA): I glance from the desk to the door. Simulator: NB stands near the desk with one hand on the chair back. Player (NA): I watch NB.

Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a locked storage room door sits between shelves of lab supplies. Player (NA): I test the handle once. Simulator: The handle holds firm. NB stands a few feet back with a key ring at his belt. Player (NA): I push the door.

Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a closed basement access door sits at the end of a service hallway. Player (NA): I check the frame for any gap. Simulator: The frame is flush. NB shifts the archive box in his arms. Player (NA): I listen at the door.
cases.simulator_response: You hear faint rustling. In the basement, guards prepare weapons.

cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a break room doorway opens onto a quiet hall. Player (NA): I stop in the doorway and study the room. Simulator: NB stands by the coffee machine and looks toward the exit. Player (NA): I watch NB.
cases.simulator_response: NB stands still. NB plans to betray you later.

cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a locked archive door stands beside a wall cabinet of labeled binders. Player (NA): I look over the key ring in NB's hand. Simulator: NB holds the keys at waist height beside the door. Player (NA): I ask which key works.

cases.description: Simulator responds but fails to resolve core question.
cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, smoke drifts lightly from a copier alcove beside a locked records door. Player (NA): I point at the lock and the keys. Simulator: NB lifts the key ring. Smoke continues to drift from the alcove. Player (NA): Which key opens this?
cases.simulator_response: NB jingles the keys while smoke thickens.

cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a narrow corridor leads past NB toward an open stairwell door. Player (NA): I look past him toward the stairwell. Simulator: NB stands in the middle of the path with one hand on the rail. Player (NA): I step forward.
cases.simulator_response: NB blocks the path. You decide to turn back.

cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a small conference room holds a table, two chairs, and a stack of folders. Player (NA): I plant my hands on the table edge. Simulator: NB faces you across the table with both hands braced on it. Player (NA): I stand firm.
cases.simulator_response: NB slams the table. You feel ashamed and look away.

cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a loading dock office has a roll-up door, a desk, and a lit exit sign. Player (NA): I square my shoulders and hold my ground. Simulator: NB faces you from a few feet away with the door at his back. Player (NA): I stare at NB.
cases.simulator_response: NB steps closer. You say, "I surrender."

cases.transcript: Opening scene: You enter a new space. In this space, a locked records room door sits at the end of a fluorescent hallway. Player (NA): I test the handle once and watch the latch. Simulator: The latch stays set. NB stands beside the frame and watches your hands. Player (NA): I try the door again.
cases.simulator_response: NB watches you. Fireworks explode in the background.
